description_long: This is a modern tram elevated on a viaduct with five supporting columns, featuring a streamlined, elongated body with multiple articulated sections. The tram has large, rectangular windows arranged in a continuous band along both sides, providing ample visibility for passengers. The roof is equipped with two single-arm pantographs for overhead power collection, and the undercarriage is detailed with visible bogies and mechanical components. The exterior appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with glass windows and some plastic or composite elements for trim and detailing. The tram is designed for urban public transportation, with multiple sliding doors on each side for efficient passenger flow. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for integration into a modern cityscape.
description: A sleek, articulated modern tram on an elevated viaduct, featuring large continuous windows, multiple sliding doors, and two single-arm pantographs on the roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the streamlined nose, central headlights, and the start of the window band, with the pantograph bases visible on the roof.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the tram, continuous window bands, multiple sliding doors, and the five supporting viaduct columns.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the tram's tapered end, rear lights, and the continuation of the window band, with pantograph bases visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the same window and door arrangement, and the viaduct structure.
attribute_door_configuration: Four sliding doors on each side, evenly spaced along the length of the tram, located at passenger entry points.
attribute_window_arrangement: Continuous band of large, rectangular windows along both sides, evenly spaced with minimal separation, providing a panoramic view.
